name: Health Secure Basic

benefits: Family floater for up to 4 members
benefits_text: Family floater plan with cashless hospitalization at network hospitals and no-claim bonus.

benefits_text: Premium health plan covering worldwide hospitalization, maternity, and critical illnesses.
